title: Cable provider removes personal information posted online of customers with overdue accounts
summary: In early December 2015, our Office was alerted to the existence of a Facebook page for a certain municipality on which a local cable television provider had posted a list of its customers having overdue accounts and the amounts they owed. Due to the sensitivity of the personal information, our Office immediately contacted the cable provid...
